evals.name: credit-risk-literature-map
evals.prompt: Map the literature for improving credit early-warning models in a bank. I need papers, successful cases, benchmarks, and evaluation patterns.
evals.expected_behavior: Classifies the problem as banking plus temporal/tabular/survival or early warning, separates banking and adjacent-domain sources, evaluates evidence quality, and highlights out-of-time validation and leakage risks.

evals.name: mule-account-literature-map
evals.prompt: Find publication-grounded methods for mule account or fraud-ring detection in banking transaction networks.
evals.expected_behavior: Maps graph anomaly/fraud detection literature, banking transfer assumptions, datasets/benchmarks, precision@k under review capacity, adversarial drift, and explainability caveats.
